summary: Iteration 146: Verified rapid tab switching fix (AbortController + 300ms debounce). App does NOT freeze when rapidly clicking between 'Mill Entries' and 'Auto Vehicle Weight' sub-tabs 8 times. All data loads correctly after settling.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 146 verified the rapid tab switching fix. The fix adds AbortController + 300ms debounce to fetchEntries, fetchTotals, fetchSuggestions in App.js (lines 440-602) and fetchData in CashBook.jsx (lines 136-188). VehicleWeight.jsx and AutoWeightEntries.jsx were already fixed. Key test: Rapidly clicked between Mill Entries and Auto Vehicle Weight sub-tabs 8 times at 80ms intervals - app remained responsive and data loaded after settling. ERR_ABORTED network errors during rapid switching are EXPECTED and prove the fix works (previous requests are cancelled).

features_tested.rapid_tab_switching_8_times: PASS - App did NOT freeze during rapid switching
features_tested.auto_vehicle_weight_data_loads: PASS - Vehicle Weight page loaded with weighbridge display
features_tested.entries_tab_loads_after_switching: PASS - Mill Entries tab still works
features_tested.no_critical_console_errors: PASS - No uncaught errors (ERR_ABORTED is expected)

files_with_fix: /app/frontend/src/App.js - Lines 440-602: fetchSuggestions, fetchEntries, fetchTotals with AbortController + 300ms debounce in useEffect
/app/frontend/src/components/VehicleWeight.jsx - Lines 402-436: fetchData with AbortController + debounce (already fixed)
/app/frontend/src/components/AutoWeightEntries.jsx - Lines 46-77: fetchData with AbortController + debounce (already fixed)
fix_verification.fix_pattern: Each fetch function: 1) Aborts previous request via AbortController ref, 2) Creates new AbortController, 3) Passes signal to axios, 4) Checks !ctrl.signal.aborted before state updates. Main useEffect uses 300ms setTimeout debounce with cleanup.
fix_verification.test_method: Rapid clicking between sub-tabs at 80-100ms intervals for 8 cycles, then verify app responsiveness and data loading
